# Sprint 0.1 Environment Setup

**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish the core architecture and technology stack for the clinical trial site feasibility platform.

## Description
Set up the development environment, including Snowflake, dbt, and Streamlit. Configure version control and CI/CD pipelines.

## Deliverable
Functional development environment
